SQL Query:
SELECT p.HS06, SUM(f.[Trade Value (US$)]) AS TotalTradeValue
            FROM FactTrade f
            INNER JOIN DimCountry rc ON f.ReporterCountryId = rc.CountryID
            INNER JOIN DimCountry pc ON f.PartnerCountryId = pc.CountryID
            INNER JOIN DimProduct p ON f.ProductID = p.ProductID_SK
            WHERE 
                f.CreationDateKey = 20201231 AND
                f.Is_Active = 'Y' AND
                pc.Country <> 'World' AND
                f.[Trade Flow Code] = 2 AND
                p.HS06 = '999999'
            GROUP BY p.HS06
Response:
In 2018, the products ranked by trade value, based on trade flow code 2, are as follows:
Product 1: HS06 Code [999999], Total Trade Value: [735187919946.0] US$
